zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Pelham於大約1355年出生在英國素可勞頓時，他的父親Thomas Pelham38歲，母親Agnes de Ginseng32歲。他於大約1387年9月與Alice Crownall在英國英格蘭素福爾可卡文迪什結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1429年2月12日在英國哈普爾易斯爾 本 懷特享年75歲，埋葬在英國素可洛波次布利其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Pelham于大约1355年出生在英国素可勞頓时，他的父亲Thomas Pelham38岁，母亲Agnes de Ginseng32岁。他于大约1387年9月与Alice Crownall在英国英格兰素福爾可卡文迪什结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1429年2月12日在英国哈普爾易斯爾 本 懷特享年75岁，埋葬在英国素可洛波次布利其。

nameMeanings.name: Pelham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Sussex): habitational name from Brent Pelham, Furneux Pelham, and Stocking Pelham in Hertfordshire, so called from the Old English personal name Pēola + hām ‘homestead’. Compare Pellham .

History: The manor of Pelham in Hertfordshire, England, was held by Walter de Pelham in the reign of Edward I (1272–1307). His descendants became constables of Pevensey Castle, Sussex, and were so influential that their badge, the buckle, is seen in at least eleven of the county's churches, and as a decoration on iron chimney-backs in Sussex farmhouses. Various branches of the family were ennobled and their titles include earl of Chichester and earl of Yarborough. The family also once held the dukedom of Newcastle and the marquessate of Clare. Peter Pelham (born c. 1695), an engraver, emigrated to Boston, MA, after 1728, and was stepfather to the artist John Singleton Copley.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Pelham was born about 1355, in Laughton, Sussex, England, his father, Thomas Pelham, was 38 and his mother, Agnes de Ginseng, was 32. He married Alice Crownall about September 1387, in Cavendish, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 12 February 1429, in Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England, at the age of 75, and was buried in Robertsbridge, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Pelham est né environ 1355, à Laughton, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Pelham, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Ginseng, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Alice Crownall environ septembre 1387, à Cavendish, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 12 février 1429, à Isle of Wight, Hampshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Robertsbridge, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Pelham um 1355 in Laughton, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Pelham 38 und seine Mutter Agnes de Ginseng 32. Er hat um September 1387 in Cavendish, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Alice Crownall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 12. Februar 1429 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England und wurde in Robertsbridge, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Pelham è nato il circa 1355 nel Laughton, Sussex, England, il suo padre, Thomas Pelham, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Ginseng, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Alice Crownall circa settembre 1387, nel Cavendish, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 12 febbraio 1429, nel Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a Robertsbridge, Sussex, England.

ja.Laughton, Sussex, England: イギリススセックスラウトン
ja.Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England: イギリスハンプシュアイアイスル オフ ウィト

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Pelhamが約1355年にイギリススセックスラウトンで生まれた時，父Thomas Pelhamは38歳，母Agnes de Ginsengは32歳であった。約1387年9月にイギリスイギリススフォルクカベンディッシュでAlice Crownallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1429年2月12日にイギリスハンプシュアイアイスル オフ ウィトで75歳で死去し，イギリススセックスロバートスブリッジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Pelham(이)가 대략 1355년 영국 수세스 로그h턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Pelham(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Ginseng(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1387년 9월 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 카븐디시에서 Alice Crownall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1429년 2월 12일 영국 함프실르 이슬일 프 와이트에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 로버츠브리지에 묻혔다.

mn.Cavendish, Suffolk, England: Cavendish, Sudfole, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Pelham nasceu aproximadamente 1355, em Laughton, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Pelham, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Ginseng, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Crownall aproximadamente setembro de 1387, em Cavendish, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 12 de fevereiro de 1429, em Isle of Wight, Hampshire, Inglaterra, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Robertsbridge, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Pelham родился около 1355 г. в местности лотон, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Pelham было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Ginseng, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Crownall около сентябрь 1387 г. в местности кавендиш, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 12 февраля 1429 г. в местности исл оф ваит, хампшир, Англия в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности робирцбридж, суссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Pelham nació aproximadamente 1355, en Laughton, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Pelham, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Agnes de Ginseng, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Alice Crownall aproximadamente septiembre de 1387, en Cavendish, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 12 de febrero de 1429, en Isle of Wight, Hampshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Robertsbridge, Sussex, Inglaterra.
